channels.name: 正应
channels.description: 體/用 五行 relation of the original hexagram

channels.name: 变应
channels.description: Changed hexagram's 用-side trigram vs 體

channels.name: 日应
channels.description: Day's earthly branch element vs 體

channels.name: 刻应
channels.description: Omens at the exact moment of casting

channels.name: 外应
channels.description: Objects or people appearing at casting

channels.name: 方应
channels.description: Querent's directional position relative to caster

channel_classification.note: Channels 1-3 computed from hexagram. Channel 4 from calendar. Channels 5-10 from 三要 perception. The hexagram provides 3/10 channels; the remaining 7 require observation.

inversion_rule.principle: Hexagram 生克 overrides perceptual omen sign
inversion_rule.source_quote: 必须以易卦为主，克应次之
inversion_rule.example: Gold = auspicious in 三要, but if 体 is Wood, Metal 克 Wood = harmful. Coffin = death in 三要, but if 体 is Fire, Wood 生 Fire = recovery.

xiangbei.approaching: favorable sign arriving → good fortune coming; harmful sign arriving → disaster approaching
xiangbei.departing: favorable sign leaving → good fortune spent; harmful sign leaving → disaster past
xiangbei.mechanism: Adds temporal arrow (approaching/receding) to every 用 input. Direction modifies the temporal dimension of the reading, not the valence.

extractable: channel → element mapping (algebraic channels fully formalized)
静占 graceful degradation (drop channels 5-10 when no input)
context_only: 三要 framework (perceptual theory — 虚灵 cultivation, not algorithm)
真生真克 intensity gradient (strength of 生克 by seasonal context)
心易 anti-literalism (trigram→referent is many-to-many, context-selected)
